faq.title: Common Questions About GEO and Findable
faq.description: Generative Engine Optimization is the new SEO. Here's what you need to know about tracking your brand in AI answers.
faq.cta: Have more questions? Talk to us

items.question: What is GEO (Generative Engine Optimization)?
items.answer: GEO is the practice of optimizing brand visibility inside AI answers — ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini, and Korean engines like HyperCLOVA. As AI search replaces traditional search (Gartner: -25% by 2026), GEO becomes the new SEO.

items.question: Which AI engines does Findable track?
items.answer: Seven engines: ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini (English), and HyperCLOVA X, Naver, Daum (Korean). Findable is the only platform with full Korean engine coverage.

items.question: How is Findable different from Profound or Peec?
items.answer: Profound, Peec, AthenaHQ, HubSpot AEO — none of them track Korean AI engines. Findable also offers Korean Entity Grounding to track all variants of your brand name (Korean, English, mixed).

items.question: Who is Findable for?
items.answer: K-beauty and K-fashion brands going global, Korean marketing teams of foreign brands (Apple, LV, Tesla Korea), Korean D2C brands on Musinsa or 29CM, and Korean B2B SaaS — anyone who needs to be found by AI.

items.question: How does pricing work?
items.answer: Free Audit (1 time, ₩0), Starter ₩99K/month, Growth ₩390K, Scale ₩990K, Enterprise from ₩30M/year. Pay with Toss (KRW), PayPal Business (USD), or Wire Transfer for Enterprise.
